about.label: About
about.title: From within the digital
about.bio1: I am a researcher and writer working at the intersection of technology, culture, and human relations. I strive to understand and communicate the societal impacts of digital transformation.
about.bio2: For over a decade, I have been conducting research, writing essays, and developing projects in the fields of technology and culture. Artificial intelligence, digital culture, and human-technology interaction are my primary areas of focus.
about.bio3: In my work, I aim to bridge academic depth with everyday life.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Research & Thought
projects.subtitle: Works examining the cultural fabric of the digital age.

medeniyet.title: Civilization: The Anthropological Root of a Word
medeniyet.description: A comprehensive research project examining the linguistic and cultural evolution of civilization. The journey of meaning from its origins to today.

etzHayim.title: On Etz Hayim and the Creation of the Universe
etzHayim.description: The intersection of creation mythology in mystical traditions with modern science. A cosmological journey from Kabbalah to the present day.

akis.title: 'Flow': The Anatomy of a Social Media Term
akis.description: A sociological and psychological analysis of the concept of 'flow' in the digital age. The transformative effect of social media on language.

veri.title: Lost in Data: Modern Humans and Digital Memory
veri.description: A philosophical essay on memory, identity, and knowledge storage in a digitalizing world. The position of humanity amid data abundance.

ayse.quote: Emre's work is among the rare pieces that deeply understand the relationship between technology and humanity. It brings together academic rigor with a creative perspective.
ayse.title: Professor of Digital Anthropology

mehmet.quote: The detail and depth he demonstrates in his projects is impressive. His consulting on digital transformation is invaluable.
mehmet.title: Technology Entrepreneur

zeynep.quote: Emre's writings explain complex topics in a language that everyone can understand. Both informative and inspiring.
zeynep.title: Cultural Researcher

articles.label: Articles
articles.title: Thoughts & Analyses
articles.subtitle: In-depth readings on digital culture, technology, and philosophy.

digitalShadow.title: Digital Shadow: The Data That Follows Us
digitalShadow.excerpt: Every click, every search, every share... How do our digital footprints define us? The invisible effect of data on identity.

aiCreativity.title: Artificial Intelligence and the Creativity Paradox
aiCreativity.excerpt: Are AI tools killing creativity, or opening new doors? The complex dance of human-machine creativity.

metaverse.title: Metaverse: Escape or Evolution?
metaverse.excerpt: Are virtual worlds replacing reality, or expanding it? The philosophical dimensions of digital existence.
